title: Outokumpu Initiates a Collaboration with Norsk e-Fuel to Convert Carbon Side Streams into eSAF
content: Outokumpu and Norsk e-Fuel have signed a Memorandum of Understanding to develop a CO-to-Sustainable Aviation Fuel (eSAF) plant in Tornio, Finland. Utilizing carbon monoxide side streams from Outokumpuâ€™s ferrochrome production, the facility aims to produce 80,000â€“100,000 tons of eSAF annually. Norsk e-Fuel will lead the project, with a feasibility study starting in 2026, an investment decision expected by 2028, and production slated for 2032. The initiative, estimated at EUR 1.2â€“1.5 billion, is projected to create approximately 250 jobs. This collaboration supports Outokumpuâ€™s circular economy goals, potentially reducing its direct COâ‚‚ emissions by 200,000 tons per yearâ€”20% of its global total. By leveraging the Tornio siteâ€™s consistent carbon supply and Finlandâ€™s clean energy, the project targets cost-efficient aviation decarbonization and enhanced European energy independence.
author: Analysts Account
